description:
I'm a Frontend Engineer specializing in modern enterprise Angular applications (Angular 17–21) across Fintech, Healthcare, and E-commerce.
I work with Angular Signals, Zoneless architecture, NgRx Signal Store, and TailwindCSS to build scalable, high-performance UIs.
Beyond work, I explore static site generation with Astro and build AI-first tooling to sharpen developer workflows.
Available for remote roles (EU/UK/Global) where I can drive technical quality and delivery velocity.
